title: Disenchantments
description: Minecraft Enchantments, but it's Opposite Day
body:
Ever wondered what it would be like if enchantments worked backwards? No? Too bad!  
List of enchantments so far:  
Bluntness: Lowers the damage of your weapon  
Fire Absence: Grants fire resistance to attacked mob for 4 or 8 seconds depending on level  
Decaying: Damages equipment when EXP is collected  
Breaking: Adds a chance to take double damage each use  
Blessing of Arthropods: Reduces damage dealt to arthropods and gives the arthropod Speed IV  
  
Numbers are the same as the normal enchantments, but flipped!
